title: Core Values
text:
NLR's core values guide our actions and acknowledge that how we work is as important as what we deliver.
These principles guide our daily actions and efforts.
Impact
Contribute positively to NLR's vision, mission, and strategy.
Innovation
Challenge conventional approaches, lead change, and contribute solutions to benefit society.
Collaboration
Foster mutual learning, teamwork, and partnerships.
Safety
Commit to the safety, security, and wellness of our NLR community.
Community
Foster a caring, respectful, and mission-driven workplace.
